customSteps.b: We begin with a one-hour paid consultation — $300 — to talk through your project and your investment goals, honestly.

The right plot, sourced and verified — title, access, slope — against Thai building code and the 2025 hillside law. For development projects, a full feasibility study models cost, revenue and return before anything is bought.

The land and the numbers shape the brief. We lead the design team — our in-house architect on site, partner firms where the project calls for them — from first concept to a complete, build-ready package: the master plan for a development, the floor plans for a private home.
Contracts, permits and the lease side structured from the start.
Contractors tendered and chosen for this project's terrain and budget; our project manager runs daily execution, with design authority on site.

customLocations.note: Hillside and sea-view plots across Bo Phut, Maenam and Chaweng Noi.
Premium west-coast land, from Kamala down to Cape Panwa.

pillars.title: Honest Guidance
pillars.body: We tell you what we'd tell a friend. No pressure, no spin — just detailed, completely honest answers until you're certain. Most clients say it's the first time buying abroad felt safe.

pillars.title: Quality Over Quantity
pillars.body: As a boutique agency, we only work with clients who align with our values. That lets us give you a genuinely personal experience and build relationships that last well beyond the sale.

pillars.title: Numbers That Work
pillars.body: Every property is vetted with ROI, rental potential, and appreciation in mind. We'll never advise you to buy a deal that doesn't perform — your second home should earn its keep.

personas.b: Seeking assets that work as hard as they do — strong yields, real appreciation, and a foothold in tax-friendly markets we know inside out.
Looking for the one. A place that feels like theirs the moment they walk in — somewhere to put down roots and live for years to come.
After a second home for the season — somewhere to retreat, host, and return to whenever the world gets a little too loud.

differentiators.b: We also run luxury vacation rentals — so while you're in town hunting for your next property, we'll find you somewhere beautiful to stay.
Our founder brings 10 years of marketing experience. Our most viral video has 12M+ views on Instagram and 6M on TikTok — we genuinely understand how to market property.
Sellers and developers trust us with their exclusive listings, because we consistently demonstrate the ability to market a property and close the deal.
Buyers trust our instinct. We have a knack for offering people exactly what they're looking for — even when they didn't yet know they were looking for it.
We partner with established law firms — essential, and reassuring, when you're buying property abroad.
Our founder is Thai. That means real local connections, and early access to off-market deals and the next best investments before they ever surface.

testimonials.quote: I spoke with many agents, but Sofia was the only one who took the time to provide detailed explanations and completely honest answers. Her knowledge and integrity sealed the deal — I knew I had to work with her.
testimonials.name: Erik

testimonials.quote: Investing abroad requires trust, and Sofia earned mine from the start. She clearly explained Thailand's ownership options, arranged legal due diligence, and truly understood my asks and design preferences. She presented the perfect selection of properties, and we ultimately closed on a fantastic off-plan ocean-view villa. A great experience working with Sofia.
testimonials.name: Brian

testimonials.quote: She helped me market and sell my land with a modern approach quite different from what most agents on the island are doing, generating strong international exposure and enquiries from buyers outside Thailand, which was particularly valuable. Hardworking, professional and always responsive, she stayed proactive and committed to the best possible result. I'd happily recommend her to anyone looking to sell in Koh Samui.
testimonials.name: Anonymous seller
